summary: Vicount Kurasivil, a former servant of House Merbinger, confronts the current vassal house and accuses them of disrespecting his family's legacy. He reveals that he has always been in possession of the key to the House Merbinger's Legacy Vault, which contains a powerful magic pendant. Vicount Kurasivil intends to show the current leaders who is stronger and takes them to Count Windg's barracks.
key_moments: Vicount Kurasivil accuses the current vassal house of disrespecting House Merbinger's legacy
He reveals that he has always been in possession of the key to the Legacy Vault
He intends to show the current leaders who is stronger and takes them to Count Windg's barracks
